race.comment: FLYING CAPITAL (2) is a 4YO son of Capitalist who has taken a while to get to the races, so he's obviously had issues but also looks to have his fair share of talent. Has had three jumpouts this time in, the latest over 1000m at Camperdown on Mar 16 when he travelled on on-speed and zoomed clear in the straight to win by about 8 lengths. Draws out but looks to have the tactical speed to overcome that. ZOUSOUTH (3) finished 2.25 lengths from the winner in fourth last start, which was an improvement on his sixth at Werribee the run before. Also an acceptor at Cranbourne on Friday night. SAPPHIRE REIGN (11) should be peaking now after finishing second over 1000m at Bairnsdale last time at the third run of the campaign. Should camp just off the leaders and is among the leading chances. MAYA'S ACE (8) is back after a break of a year but has had 3 jumpouts this time in, winning the second of them.
